title: Zuri's Peek-a-Boo Seasons
synopsis: Join Zuri as she plays peek-a-boo with nature through all four seasons, discovering flowers in spring, butterflies in summer, leaves in autumn, and snowflakes in winter.

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, hiding behind a large tree trunk in spring with soft pastel pink cherry blossoms blooming all around
illustration.alt: Zuri hiding behind a blooming cherry tree in spring

pages.text: There she is! Behind the spring flowers!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, peeking out from behind the same tree, now surrounded by bright tulips and daffodils in spring pastels
illustration.alt: Zuri emerging from behind spring flowers

illustration.description: The same scene in bright summer colors with Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, hiding behind the full green leafy tree with colorful butterflies flying around
illustration.alt: Zuri hiding behind a leafy summer tree with butterflies

pages.text: There she is! Playing with summer butterflies!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, laughing and reaching for bright orange and yellow butterflies around the same tree in full summer brightness
illustration.alt: Zuri playing with colorful summer butterflies

illustration.description: The same tree scene in warm autumn colors with Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, hidden behind a pile of golden, orange, and red fallen leaves
illustration.alt: Zuri hiding in autumn leaves under the tree

pages.text: There she is! Under the autumn leaves!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, bursting up from the pile of warm-colored autumn leaves with joy, leaves floating all around
illustration.alt: Zuri emerging from a pile of autumn leaves

illustration.description: The same tree in winter with cool blues and whites, Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, hiding behind the bare snowy tree with snowflakes gently falling
illustration.alt: Zuri hiding behind a snowy winter tree

pages.text: There she is! Catching winter snowflakes! Peek-a-boo, Zuri loves all seasons!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, dancing in the snow with arms outstretched, catching snowflakes with the winter tree behind her in cool winter colors

metadata.illustrationStyle: seasonal cycle, spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, winter cool, same scene different seasons, time passing, nature calendar, cyclical beauty

questions.question: What does Zuri hide behind in spring?
questions.explanation: Zuri hides behind the beautiful spring flowers when they bloom!

questions.question: What does Zuri play with in summer?
questions.explanation: In summer, Zuri plays with the colorful butterflies that fly around!

questions.question: What falls from the tree in winter?
questions.explanation: In winter, beautiful white snowflakes fall from the sky for Zuri to catch!
